messages.content: Busca en Google el precio del Bitcoin ahora mismo

<tool_call>{"name": "navigate", "arguments": {"url": "https://www.google.com/search?q=precio+bitcoin+ahora"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_text", "arguments": {"selector": ".card-section"}}</tool_call>
Go to GitHub and search for Python machine learning libraries

<tool_call>{"name": "navigate", "arguments": {"url": "https://github.com/search?q=python+machine+learning&type=repositories&sort=stars"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_text", "arguments": {"selector": ".repo-list"}}</tool_call>
Rellena el formulario de contacto en esta web con mis datos

Necesito saber qué datos usar. ¿Puedes confirmar tu nombre, email y mensaje? Para formularios de contacto siempre confirmo antes de enviar.

Una vez confirmes, lo haré:
<tool_call>{"name": "fill_form", "arguments": {"fields": {"name": "[tu nombre]", "email": "[tu email]", "message": "[tu mensaje]"}}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "click", "arguments": {"selector": "button[type=submit]"}}</tool_call>
Take a screenshot of the current page
<tool_call>{"name": "screenshot", "arguments": {"output_path": "~/Screenshots/screenshot_{{datetime}}.png", "full_page": false}}</tool_call>
Descarga el PDF de la factura en esta página

<tool_call>{"name": "find_element", "arguments": {"selector": "a[href*='.pdf'], a[download]"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "click", "arguments": {"selector": "a[href*='.pdf']"}}</tool_call>
✅ Descarga iniciada. El archivo aparecerá en ~/Downloads.
Scroll down to the bottom of the page and tell me what's there

<tool_call>{"name": "scroll", "arguments": {"direction": "down", "amount": "page_end"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "screenshot", "arguments": {"full_page": false}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_text", "arguments": {"selector": "footer, .footer, [class*=footer]"}}</tool_call>
Abre YouTube y busca tutoriales de Python para principiantes

<tool_call>{"name": "navigate", "arguments": {"url": "https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=python+tutorial+principiantes"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_text", "arguments": {"selector": "#video-title", "limit": 10}}</tool_call>
Log into my account on this website

I'll need your credentials. Please provide them — they won't be stored:

⚠️ **Security note**: I handle credentials for single-session use only. They are not saved to memory or logs.

Once you provide username and password:
<tool_call>{"name": "fill_form", "arguments": {"fields": {"username": "[username]", "password": "[password]"}}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "click", "arguments": {"selector": "button[type=submit], input[type=submit], .login-btn"}}</tool_call>
Extrae todos los enlaces de esta página
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_links", "arguments": {"selector": "a[href]", "include_text": true}}</tool_call>
Check if this website is working: example.com

<tool_call>{"name": "navigate", "arguments": {"url": "https://example.com", "timeout": 10000}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_text", "arguments": {"selector": "title, h1"}}</tool_call>
Busca noticias de hoy sobre inteligencia artificial en español
<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "inteligencia artificial noticias hoy", "language": "es", "time_range": "day"}}</tool_call>
Click on the 'Accept All Cookies' button if it appears

<tool_call>{"name": "find_element", "arguments": {"selector": "button", "text_contains": ["Accept All", "Accept Cookies", "Aceptar todas", "Aceptar"], "required": false}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "click_if_exists", "arguments": {"selector": "[class*=cookie] button, [id*=cookie] button, button[data-testid*=accept]"}}</tool_call>
Navega por 3 artículos de Hacker News y dame un resumen

<tool_call>{"name": "navigate", "arguments": {"url": "https://news.ycombinator.com"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_links", "arguments": {"selector": ".titleline a", "limit": 3}}</tool_call>

Luego para cada artículo:
<tool_call>{"name": "navigate", "arguments": {"url": "[article_url_1]"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_text", "arguments": {"selector": "article, main, .content", "max_chars": 2000}}</tool_call>
Wait for a page to fully load then extract the main content

<tool_call>{"name": "wait_for_element", "arguments": {"selector": "main, article, #content", "timeout": 10000}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "extract_text", "arguments": {"selector": "main, article, #content, .content"}}</tool_call>
Compra el primer resultado de esta búsqueda en Amazon

⚠️ **Acción de compra requiere confirmación explícita**.

Puedo navegar hasta el producto, pero para completar una compra necesito:
1. Tu confirmación explícita del producto y precio
2. Que estés iniciado sesión en Amazon
3. Confirmación final antes de hacer clic en "Comprar"

¿Continúo hasta la página del producto primero?
Extract all images from this webpage and save them

<tool_call>{"name": "extract_elements", "arguments": {"selector": "img[src]", "attribute": "src"}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "wget -P ~/Downloads/images/ [image_urls]"}}</tool_call>
Rellena y envía este formulario de registro

Antes de enviar cualquier formulario, necesito confirmar los datos. Dime qué información usar y te mostraré lo que voy a rellenar antes de enviarlo.

⚠️ Nunca envío formularios automáticamente sin confirmación previa de los datos.
Monitor this page and tell me when it changes

I'll set up a page change monitor.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "page-monitor", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 * * * *"}, "nodes": [{"type": "web_request", "url": "[current_url]", "extract_text": true, "output_var": "content"}, {"type": "exec_command", "command": "echo '{{content}}' | md5sum | cut -d' ' -f1", "output_var": "hash"}, {"type": "exec_command", "command": "cat ~/.monitors/page_hash.txt 2>/dev/null || echo NONE", "output_var": "prev_hash"}, {"type": "filter", "conditions": [{"field": "{{hash}}", "op": "neq", "value": "{{prev_hash}}"}], "next_if_true": "notify", "next_if_false": "silent"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Monitor created — checks hourly, notifies you on any content change.
¿Cuál es el tipo de cambio EUR/USD ahora?
<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "EUR USD tipo de cambio ahora", "time_range": "hour"}}</tool_call>
Get the text content of https://example.com without opening a browser window
<tool_call>{"name": "web_request", "arguments": {"url": "https://example.com", "method": "GET", "extract_text": true, "headless": true}}</tool_call>
Abre mi email en el navegador
<tool_call>{"name": "navigate", "arguments": {"url": "https://mail.google.com"}}</tool_call>
